rationale: No qualitative change from Poland's perspective — Iran deal remains unresolved, energy price uncertainty continues, all other headlines are distant or irrelevant.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: Continued uncertainty over Iran nuclear/sanctions deal keeps oil market volatility elevated, indirectly affecting Polish energy costs and inflation outlook.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon as Iran deal talks continue
top_events.summary: Israeli strikes on Lebanon add regional instability that could affect oil prices and EU security posture, with minor indirect relevance to Poland's energy costs.

top_events.title: EU migration debate: thousands rally in Rome over migration policy
top_events.summary: Ongoing EU-wide migration debate has some relevance to Poland given border pressures, but this rally is a continuation of existing political discourse.
